concerns.detail: Unsupported personal attack on a specific PhD student using gendered insults ('学术妲己' implying romantic/sexual manipulation for academic gain) and unsubstantiated cheating allegations
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding今年stf的phd，纯学术妲己,考试还作弊

concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive documentation regarding UCLA professor Jiaqi Ma's IEEE paper retractions, suppressing specific public academic misconduct records
concerns.excerpt: UCLA Jiaqi Ma 名下多篇IEEE顶刊 retraction可查

concerns.detail: Replacement of detailed allegations about Jiaqi Ma's image manipulation practices with unrelated content ('NUs You Yang'), effectively erasing specific research integrity concerns
concerns.excerpt: 多篇论文涉嫌图从别处拼的 比如  一篇发表于Elsevier... -> NUs You Yang
